options.name: -generated_by
options.description: sink pins in the parent clock trees from which this clock tree is generated ((instTerm|term)+, optional)

options.name: -name
options.description: user-defined identifier for this generated clock tree

options.name: -parents
options.description: parent clock trees for the generated clock tree

options.name: -search_method
options.description: {same_instance multi_stage} search methodology to be used when tracing the path to the generator inputs

options.name: -source
options.description: source pin of the generated clock tree ((instTerm|term), required)

options.name: -stop_at_sdc_clock_roots
options.description: stop searching for parts of the clock tree through SDC clock roots
